titleStmt.title: SII 38.143: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 143. (A.R. No. 143 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a sixth pillar round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tirumadamu. Records a gift of ninety sheep by an army official Vēḷāṉ Madhurāntakaṉ alias Daṇḍanāyakaṉ Rājādhirāja Iḷaṅgōvēḷāṉ, the kiḻār of the village Naḍār in Tiraimūr-nāḍu in Uyyakoṇḍāṉvaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Chōḻamaṇḍalam for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The shepherds of the locality, Tribhuvanasundara-chēri, Gaṇvati Śēri and Śēndaṉ Kāri received the sheep and agreed to measure out an uḻakku oil daily at the treasury of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu of Rājādhirāja-kōṭṭam.

The accountant of the village, Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Nārāyaṇaṉ Ādittaṉ wrote the deed at the bidding of the above shepherds. The merchants of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, the physician of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and others figure as signatories to this transaction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumatamuntapuvitala vicaiyiṟ piṟan=ta kaṭa
l cūḻntikiri Aritamākkavatarittatani(m) makaḷaiyum maṇa
m puṇarn=taruḷi maṟakkali kaṭintu kuṇam puṇar varicilaik kun=taṇar kulai
vuṟa ñciyam putu malarkkuñcikku kānūram nokki pūṇṭiyum ve
ḻvikkirāmamum niḻeri parappi viṭṭi nilava mātu neṭṭaiyil kollā
purattu vallaraṇ citaittap pativayil kāḷiyai Aṭiyeḻappu
ṟitta vārttai ceṉṟicaittalum vottevaṉ teṇṇi Āṉai
yum kutiraiyum Iratamum miṭain=ta ceṉaiyum tāṉum celuttu vante
tirtta Āhava mallaṉ Amartukaiḻiya veka veṅkaḷiṟṟu vici micai
miṭain=ta Oṅkumuraṇ � tāvaraṅku cilaituran=ta ceñcāmāri taṉku
ñcirkku vaṭṭilum tiruppuya mannilum taṭavarai mārvilum Oṉṟine
ka meṉṟu pukkuruvva kaiyar taṭukaṇai nekiḻattor cuṭar velar
tiyākki Aṭupaṭai vaḻaṅkumātiyam puravi maṉnavaṉ māmaṉ maṇṭa
yi Acokaiyaṉ mutaliyar taṇṭapālarait taṟaippaṭanūṟi Ā
havamallaṉai mel kaṭal pāccic catturupayaṅkaraṉ karapattiraṉ mu
tal pattiracar tipakaṭṭiḷam Eḻuvattaiñcum Āṅkavanaya kulane kuḻu
m vantu vecariyum Oṭṭakaniraikaḷum teviyar kuḻumamum ceḻunetip piṟa
kkamum pāvaiyar kuḻāmum paṟan=talaik kavarntu māpperumpukaḻ mika va
ḷartta kopparakecarivanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājen=tiradevarkku yā
ṇṭu 3 Āvatu coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakoṇṭāṉvaḷanāṭṭut
tiraimur nāṭṭu naṭāril naṭārkiḻāṉ veḷāṉmaturān=takanāṉa taṇṭanā
yakaṉ rājādhirājaiḷaṅkoveḷāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭai
yarkku Ācan=tirakālamum Oru nantāviḷakkeriya veṇṭuvataṟku vait
ta cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇ
ṭu tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉṟukku nicatam Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka Ivvāṇṭu muta
l Ācan=tirakālamum tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār paṇṭāratte Aḷappatāka
kaikkoṇṭom rājādhirājakkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr
ttiripuvaṉacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭikaḷ kaṇavati ceriyum cen=taṉ kāriyum Uḷ
ḷiṭṭa maṉṟāṭikaḷom Ivarkaḷ veṇṭa Eḻutineṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr Ūrk
kaṇakku nārāyaṇaṉ Ātittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr viyā
pāri rājādhirāja cileṭṭiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr pirā
pañcikan jagadindupaṇḍitaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvoṟṟi
yūr viyāpāri kāḷi kaṇavatiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kucappūr civabrāma
maṇan peṟṟaḷi vayiramekaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr vai
jyaṉ ninañcinaRead nirañcina paṭṭaneṉpaṭṭaneṉRead nirañcina paṭṭaneṉ.
Digital edition of SII 38.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
